scientific_question: Can a frozen library of known-key point Readers calibrate the key-dependent global polarity of the full XOR-aligned landscape, and can eight Readers selected on fresh A412 targets 0 through 15 improve the strongest equal-worker portfolio on untouched targets 16 through 31?

mechanistic_chain.weak_localization: Each of the 155 A413 Readers induces an assignment-free ordering of the complete 4,096-cell field.
mechanistic_chain.polarity_calibration: A frozen weighted sum of the A415 XOR-correlation scores over a pilot Reader's top-k cells selects the positive or negative global landscape orientation.
mechanistic_chain.sign_retaining_control: The A416 folded order preserves both landscape tails without a polarity decision.
mechanistic_chain.intersection_family: Rank-copula intersections combine a pilot rank with the folded landscape rank without a sign decision.
mechanistic_chain.portfolio_learning: A deterministic greedy rule selects exactly eight complementary Readers on the sixteen fresh A412 selection targets.
mechanistic_chain.external_test: The selected eight Readers are applied unchanged to the sixteen untouched A412 holdout targets.

canonical_order: pilot-calibrated polarity candidates in pilot-index, top-k, weight-family order
pilot/fold rank-copula candidates in pilot-index, alpha order
candidate_library.polarity_statistic: sum_{r=1}^k weight(r) * xor_score[pilot_order[r]]; nonnegative selects XOR-positive, negative selects XOR-negative

selection_contract.greedy_rule: At each step choose the unused candidate minimizing the geometric mean of the pointwise-minimum true-cell ranks; ties by worst rank then canonical candidate index.
selection_contract.source_models: All 155 A413 candidate models and the A415 XOR template are fitted or copied from A401 only and hash-frozen before any A412 selection score is computed.
selection_contract.selection_model_freeze: The eight canonical candidate indices, all source-model hashes, and the complete 16-by-2,793 true-rank table commitment are frozen before any A412 holdout field or label is read by A417.

holdout_contract.qualification: A417 holdout geometric-mean rank is strictly lower than the best available matched eight-worker baseline and has positive additional bit gain.

production_schedule_contract.ownership: minimum rank across the eight selected Readers, ties by frozen portfolio position
required_proofs: discovery depth no later than best source rank
total work at most eight times best source rank
